name: 4th Era - The RuneChild
short_description: Enter an awesome, fantasy world, filled with unique monsters and unlimited crafting.
detailed_description:
Enter an awesome fantasy world, filled with unique monsters and unlimited crafting.

Welcome to the world of The RuneChild.

An ancient kingdom full of magic, adventure, and amazing powers.!

Enter an Open-World, Fantasy Game; emphasizing Freedom, Exploration, and Creative Crafting. 

-

The World's Riches, Multi-layered Crafting Game.

Featuring Unlimited Character Classes, Boundless Sword Crafting,

Extreme Spell Combinations and an abundance in weird Potion Crafting.

This is a WRPG (Western Role-Playing Game); Open World, Unlimited Crafting, Multi-Classes and Construction.

-

-

Unlimited Character Customization:

4 start classes.

5 Races / 5 different heights for each race.

15^5 different Attributes combinations.

(One is a class Attribute, and has to be minimum 12.)

21 different Skills / 100 different Perks

+5 Billion Different Characters.

Not counting cosmetics, like skin colour, hair and beard.

-

Crafting your own Sword and improve it with smiting and Enchantments. 

Boundless Sword Crafting:

6 different metals.

25 different Blades.

6 Different Sword Sizes

14 different Guards.

14 different Pommels.

6 Different Metals for the Guard/Pommel.

13 different Handles.

10 Different Colours for the Handle.

6 Enchantments (None / Fire / Cold / Shock / Poison / Soul trap).

10 levels of enchantments (+1, +2.....)

+6.8 Billion Different Swords.

-

Extreme Spell Combinations:

59 different Main Types spells. (+ 18 sub-types.)

8 target (Yourself, touch, shield, target --> Storm)

20 Strengths / 20 Duration / 20 Range

+3 millions Spell Combinations

-

Abundance Potion Crafting:

50^4 different ingredients.

You can combine up to 4 ingredients, and up to 4 different effects in one potion.)

5 different Strength/Duration. (Strong effect/No duration --> Weak effect/Long duration.)

4 Different table for making potions. 

+100 Million Different Potion Combinations.

 

  • Spell Crafting; with over a million ways to combine spells—from a simple fireball to a lightning storm that covers the whole map.

  • Enchanting: Make your character Unique with his own enchantments on weapons, Armour and Jewellery. Buy them in the many shops, or make them yourself.

  • Cottage Building; Build your own cottage, anywhere on any map, and have a secure home Base.

 

  

I love playing open-world RPGs like Skyrim, Oblivion, and Morrowind, as well as exploring Tolkien’s 'Lord of the Rings' universe. So, I’ve taken the parts I enjoy most from them: the wild magic and alchemy from Morrowind, the bright colors of Oblivion, and Skyrim’s weapon improvements.

So if you like skyrim, or if you like morrowind, then try this game.
